insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every new session is an opportunity to lay the foundation for a strong understanding of the material, and by starting now, you can take the first step towards building a streak of progress that will serve you well. By focusing on completing just one session to start, you can earn your first points, break the ice, and gain momentum that will help you move away from a 0% average score and towards a more confident and accomplished you.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
